title: lathyrus filiformis
intro: Lathyrus filiformis, also known as the slender pea or narrow-leaved pea, is a perennial plant species in the genus Lathyrus, characterized by its slender stems, narrow leaves, and delicate white or pink flowers. The plant contains neurotoxic compounds, but it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus filiformis are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, although further research is needed to confirm these effects. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus filiformis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
